lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਅਨੀਲੁ ਅਨਾਦਿ ਅਨਾਹਤਿ ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਏਕੋ ਵੇਸੁ ॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: aad aneel anaad anaahat jug jug eko ves |29|
lines.english: The Primal One, the Pure Light, without beginning, without end. Throughout all the ages, He is One and the Same. ||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦੇਸੁ ਤਿਸੈ ਆਦੇਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: aades tisai aades |
lines.english: I bow to Him, I humbly bow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੀ ਇਕੁ ਭੰਡਾਰੀ ਇਕੁ ਲਾਏ ਦੀਬਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: eik sansaaree ik bhanddaaree ik laae deebaan |
lines.english: One, the Creator of the World; One, the Sustainer; and One, the Destroyer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਾ ਮਾਈ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਵਿਆਈ ਤਿਨਿ ਚੇਲੇ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: ekaa maaee jugat viaaee tin chele paravaan |
lines.english: The One Divine Mother conceived and gave birth to the three deities.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਵ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਚਲਾਵੈ ਜਿਵ ਹੋਵੈ ਫੁਰਮਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jiv tis bhaavai tivai chalaavai jiv hovai furamaan |
lines.english: He makes things happen according to the Pleasure of His Will. Such is His Celestial Order.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦੇਸੁ ਤਿਸੈ ਆਦੇਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: aades tisai aades |
lines.english: I bow to Him, I humbly bow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਵੇਖੈ ਓਨਾ ਨਦਰਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਬਹੁਤਾ ਏਹੁ ਵਿਡਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: ohu vekhai onaa nadar na aavai bahutaa ehu viddaan |
lines.english: He watches over all, but none see Him. How wonderful this is!

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਅਨੀਲੁ ਅਨਾਦਿ ਅਨਾਹਤਿ ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਏਕੋ ਵੇਸੁ ॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: aad aneel anaad anaahat jug jug eko ves |30|
lines.english: The Primal One, the Pure Light, without beginning, without end. Throughout all the ages, He is One and the Same. ||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਣੁ ਲੋਇ ਲੋਇ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: aasan loe loe bhanddaar |
lines.english: On world after world are His Seats of Authority and His Storehouses.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦੇਸੁ ਤਿਸੈ ਆਦੇਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: aades tisai aades |
lines.english: I bow to Him, I humbly bow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kar kar vekhai sirajanahaar |
lines.english: Having created the creation, the Creator Lord watches over it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸੁ ਏਕਾ ਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh paaeaa su ekaa vaar |
lines.english: Whatever was put into them, was put there once and for all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੇ ਕੀ ਸਾਚੀ ਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: naanak sache kee saachee kaar |
lines.english: O Nanak, True is the Creation of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਅਨੀਲੁ ਅਨਾਦਿ ਅਨਾਹਤਿ ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਏਕੋ ਵੇਸੁ ॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: aad aneel anaad anaahat jug jug eko ves |31|
lines.english: The Primal One, the Pure Light, without beginning, without end. Throughout all the ages, He is One and the Same. ||31||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਦੂ ਜੀਭੌ ਲਖ ਹੋਹਿ ਲਖ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਲਖ ਵੀਸ ॥
lines.translit: eik doo jeebhau lakh hohi lakh hoveh lakh vees |
lines.english: If I had 100,000 tongues, and these were then multiplied twenty times more, with each tongue,

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖੁ ਲਖੁ ਗੇੜਾ ਆਖੀਅਹਿ ਏਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਗਦੀਸ ॥
lines.translit: lakh lakh gerraa aakheeeh ek naam jagadees |
lines.english: I would repeat, hundreds of thousands of times, the Name of the One, the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਤੁ ਰਾਹਿ ਪਤਿ ਪਵੜੀਆ ਚੜੀਐ ਹੋਇ ਇਕੀਸ ॥
lines.translit: et raeh pat pavarreea charreeai hoe ikees |
lines.english: Along this path to our Husband Lord, we climb the steps of the ladder, and come to merge with Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਕੂੜੀ ਕੂੜੈ ਠੀਸ ॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree paaeeai koorree koorrai tthees |32|
lines.english: O Nanak, by His Grace He is obtained. False are the boastings of the false. ||32||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਗਲਾ ਆਕਾਸ ਕੀ ਕੀਟਾ ਆਈ ਰੀਸ ॥
lines.translit: sun galaa aakaas kee keettaa aaee rees |
lines.english: Hearing of the etheric realms, even worms long to come back home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਣਿ ਜੋਰੁ ਚੁਪੈ ਨਹ ਜੋਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aakhan jor chupai neh jor |
lines.english: No power to speak, no power to keep silent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਰੁ ਨ ਮੰਗਣਿ ਦੇਣਿ ਨ ਜੋਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jor na mangan den na jor |
lines.english: No power to beg, no power to give.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਰੁ ਨ ਰਾਜਿ ਮਾਲਿ ਮਨਿ ਸੋਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jor na raaj maal man sor |
lines.english: No power to rule, with wealth and occult mental powers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਰੁ ਨ ਜੀਵਣਿ ਮਰਣਿ ਨਹ ਜੋਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jor na jeevan maran neh jor |
lines.english: No power to live, no power to die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਹਥਿ ਜੋਰੁ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jis hath jor kar vekhai soe |
lines.english: He alone has the Power in His Hands. He watches over all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਰੁ ਨ ਸੁਰਤੀ ਗਿਆਨਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jor na suratee giaan veechaar |
lines.english: No power to gain intuitive understanding, spiritual wisdom and meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਰੁ ਨ ਜੁਗਤੀ ਛੁਟੈ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jor na jugatee chhuttai sansaar |
lines.english: No power to find the way to escape from the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਤੀ ਰੁਤੀ ਥਿਤੀ ਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: raatee rutee thitee vaar |
lines.english: Nights, days, weeks and seasons;

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਵਣ ਪਾਣੀ ਅਗਨੀ ਪਾਤਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: pavan paanee aganee paataal |
lines.english: wind, water, fire and the nether regions

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਉਤਮੁ ਨੀਚੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: naanak utam neech na koe |33|
lines.english: O Nanak, no one is high or low. ||33||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਧਰਤੀ ਥਾਪਿ ਰਖੀ ਧਰਮ ਸਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: tis vich dharatee thaap rakhee dharam saal |
lines.english: in the midst of these, He established the earth as a home for Dharma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਨਾਮ ਅਨੇਕ ਅਨੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: tin ke naam anek anant |
lines.english: Their names are uncounted and endless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਜੀਅ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਕੇ ਰੰਗ ॥
lines.translit: tis vich jeea jugat ke rang |
lines.english: Upon it, He placed the various species of beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਆਪਿ ਸਚਾ ਦਰਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa aap sachaa darabaar |
lines.english: God Himself is True, and True is His Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮੀ ਕਰਮੀ ਹੋਇ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: karamee karamee hoe veechaar |
lines.english: By their deeds and their actions, they shall be judged.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਥੈ ਸੋਹਨਿ ਪੰਚ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: tithai sohan panch paravaan |
lines.english: There, in perfect grace and ease, sit the self-elect, the self-realized Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰੀ ਕਰਮਿ ਪਵੈ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: nadaree karam pavai neesaan |
lines.english: They receive the Mark of Grace from the Merciful Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮ ਖੰਡ ਕਾ ਏਹੋ ਧਰਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: dharam khandd kaa eho dharam |
lines.english: This is righteous living in the realm of Dharma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗਇਆ ਜਾਪੈ ਜਾਇ ॥੩੪॥
lines.translit: naanak geaa jaapai jaae |34|
lines.english: O Nanak, when you go home, you will see this. ||34||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਚ ਪਕਾਈ ਓਥੈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kach pakaaee othai paae |
lines.english: The ripe and the unripe, the good and the bad, shall there be judged.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੇ ਪਵਣ ਪਾਣੀ ਵੈਸੰਤਰ ਕੇਤੇ ਕਾਨ ਮਹੇਸ ॥
lines.translit: kete pavan paanee vaisantar kete kaan mahes |
lines.english: So many winds, waters and fires; so many Krishnas and Shivas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਖੰਡ ਕਾ ਆਖਹੁ ਕਰਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: giaan khandd kaa aakhahu karam |
lines.english: And now we speak of the realm of spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੇ ਬਰਮੇ ਘਾੜਤਿ ਘੜੀਅਹਿ ਰੂਪ ਰੰਗ ਕੇ ਵੇਸ ॥
lines.translit: kete barame ghaarrat gharreeeh roop rang ke ves |
lines.english: So many Brahmas, fashioning forms of great beauty, adorned and dressed in many colors.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੇ ਇੰਦ ਚੰਦ ਸੂਰ ਕੇਤੇ ਕੇਤੇ ਮੰਡਲ ਦੇਸ ॥
lines.translit: kete ind chand soor kete kete manddal des |
lines.english: So many Indras, so many moons and suns, so many worlds and lands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੀਆ ਕਰਮ ਭੂਮੀ ਮੇਰ ਕੇਤੇ ਕੇਤੇ ਧੂ ਉਪਦੇਸ ॥
lines.translit: keteea karam bhoomee mer kete kete dhoo upades |
lines.english: So many worlds and lands for working out karma. So very many lessons to be learned!

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੇ ਦੇਵ ਦਾਨਵ ਮੁਨਿ ਕੇਤੇ ਕੇਤੇ ਰਤਨ ਸਮੁੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: kete dev daanav mun kete kete ratan samund |
lines.english: So many demi-gods and demons, so many silent sages. So many oceans of jewels.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੇ ਸਿਧ ਬੁਧ ਨਾਥ ਕੇਤੇ ਕੇਤੇ ਦੇਵੀ ਵੇਸ ॥
lines.translit: kete sidh budh naath kete kete devee ves |
lines.english: So many Siddhas and Buddhas, so many Yogic masters. So many goddesses of various kinds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੀਆ ਖਾਣੀ ਕੇਤੀਆ ਬਾਣੀ ਕੇਤੇ ਪਾਤ ਨਰਿੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: keteea khaanee keteea baanee kete paat narind |
lines.english: So many ways of life, so many languages. So many dynasties of rulers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੀਆ ਸੁਰਤੀ ਸੇਵਕ ਕੇਤੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਅੰਤੁ ॥੩੫॥
lines.translit: keteea suratee sevak kete naanak ant na ant |35|
lines.english: So many intuitive people, so many selfless servants. O Nanak, His limit has no limit! ||35||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਥੈ ਨਾਦ ਬਿਨੋਦ ਕੋਡ ਅਨੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: tithai naad binod kodd anand |
lines.english: The Sound-current of the Naad vibrates there, amidst the sounds and the sights of bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਖੰਡ ਮਹਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਪਰਚੰਡੁ ॥
lines.translit: giaan khandd meh giaan parachandd |
lines.english: In the realm of wisdom, spiritual wisdom reigns supreme.
